name: Guidewire Software, Inc.
summary: Overview and Purpose Guidewire is the platform that property and casualty (P&C) insurers rely on to engage with customers, innovate, and operate more efficiently. Founded in 2001, we serve insurers of all sizes, ranging from global carriers to regional and local providers, helping them navigate a rapidly changing insurance market. Our platform combines core systems of record with digital, analytics, and artificial intelligence (AI) capabilities. Our foundational core products, InsuranceSuite and...
